title: question markdown (frontmatter + sections)
description: One question per .md file under <domain>/questions/. This schema documents the YAML frontmatter; the body uses '## Q', optional '## Choices', '## A', '## Explanation', optional '## Speak'.

source.description: primary-source URLs (required by policy; questions are generated from sources, not copied)

speak.description: optional; English text the app reads aloud with `say`
